title: senecio legionensis
intro: Senecio legionensis, also known as Jacobaea coronillifolia or Coronillo senecio, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being a bitter tonic and an expectorant, used to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial infections, and acting as a digestive aid. It can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of conditions.
